title: Karate Zen students rake in medals at SAs
description: GEORGE - A few students from Karate Zen...
bodyText:
GEORGE - A few students from Karate Zen George participated in a national championship in Cape Town on 25 May. They did extremely well and brought home 28 medals - five gold, nine silver and 14 bronze.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
